case_title: ANGELA D WILLIAMS VS. THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EM et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ANGELA D AS TO DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EM PLOYMENT AND DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE JONES, SHIRLEY AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ANGELA D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EM PLOYMENT AND DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE JONES, SHIRLEY AN INDIVIDUAL $4,269.15 PRINCIPAL, $53.04 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,475.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
